title: Guadalajara, Jalisco — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Guadalajara is a city in Jalisco with a population of 5,268,642. Mexico’s second city, known for tequila, mariachi, and a booming tech and creative scene.
